name: Tier 5.12b - Internal Predictive Context Mechanism Diagnostic

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software mechanism evidence only; visible predictive-context binding, not full world modeling/language/planning/hardware prediction.
tier_summary.excluded_default_task: hidden_regime_switching is excluded from default 5.12b because this mechanism requires visible precursor writes; latent regime inference is future work.
